message.content:
1) Medical Records screen: Displays a list of dental treatments with dates, costs, and statuses, plus a search/filter bar and category tabs (Semua/Saya/Keluarga).  
2) Payments screen: Shows pending payment items (with amounts, due dates, and "Bayar" buttons) under tabs for Tagihan/Riwayat/Metode Bayar.  
3) Profile screen: Features user stats (visits, dental score, tier), account options (Poin & Rewards, Anggota Keluarga, QR Member), and a clean, organized layout.  

All screens look professional, with consistent branding, clear navigation, and a cohesive pink color scheme that aligns with a dental clinic’s aesthetic.
